final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: brand exposure ad, mobile screen capture
Primary request: OPPO Find X9 Pro full-screen brand announcement poster, 1080×1920 vertical format
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient background transitioning from deep blue to electric purple, subtle light rays emanating from center
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone floating at dynamic angle, ultra-slim bezels visible, reflective glass back with camera module detail
Style/medium: digital product render, commercial advertising aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered hero product, vertical 9:16 ratio, generous negative space for brand messaging
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting, soft ambient glow, premium and futuristic atmosphere
Color palette: OPPO signature green accent + deep blue to purple gradient + silver/white highlights
Materials/textures: brushed metal frame, glossy ceramic back, sapphire camera lens glass
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Pro"
Constraints: maintain 1080×1920 aspect ratio, product must dominate visual hierarchy, brand logo clearly visible
Avoid: cluttered background, competing focal points, low contrast text, generic stock aesthetic, watermark
